highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering, Solapur:

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: Is N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering has a rating of 4.03 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.2 on Campus Life, 3.55 on Placements, 4.08 on Faculty and 4.24 on Infrastructure.

placements.overview:
Students can work with faculty on research projects

Many students looking for better jobs

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering, Solapur offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Engineering. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech. The Sinhgad College Solapur course fee ranges between INR 1,38,594 to 3,34,496.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering is around INR 140000 - INR 299996.
faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering is a good institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering are Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and helpful faculty members.

review_content.Placements: My friends are placed, 25% of students got placed. The highest salary package is 10,000, the lowest package offered is Rs. 4,000, and the average is Rs. 5,000. The top companies are like TCS, Red Hat, Infosys, Wipro, Hitachi, and many more companies are coming to our college, and again, there are still companies waiting for students to respond. Basic coders and developers.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the campus hostel, the mess and library facilities are available. The library is open and available for 24 hours for hostel students. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel in campus. Wi-Fi is 10 GB per day per student user ID, and a password is allocated during admission.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Low budget having opportunity but have to be selfmade .

review_content.Placements: There are opportunities for placement, and companies are available in the college. So far, lots of companies come and go. But the reason is the level of companies to pass, getting into the company is a bit difficult. Those who have trained themselves very well might get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in both the college and hostel, and the hostel infrastructure is good. In one room, there are 4 persons, with washrooms and toilets attached to that room. It is great to have unlimited Wi-Fi in the hostel room, as well as having good infrastructure, which may bring benefits.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Decent infrastructure and placements, but consistent faculty quality requires self-motivation.

review_content.Placements: Currently, only 20% of students are placed in good companies. The average package is 4 LPA. Companies include Capgemini and Cognizant. 90% of students have completed internships; some interns worked in software provided by Syboisys, and others in embedded systems, which is a good experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure at N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering, Solapur are quite good and well-maintained. Departments are equipped with spacious classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs with updated equipment, and a central library stocked with academic books, journals, and e-resources. The campus is clean and green, offering a peaceful learning environment. Hostels are located within the campus and provide decent rooms with good ventilation, regular water supply, and security. The mess provides average-quality food with a mix of vegetarian options, and the on-campus canteen offers basic snacks and meals at reasonable prices.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a tier 3 college.

review_content.Placements: There are centralised placements in all the Sinhgad College of Engineering. There are nice placement opportunities and students get placements in various companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Amazon, Capgemini, TCS, HSBS, Tata Steel, Accenture, Flipkart, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: I had a generally positive experience. The overall quality met my expectations, and there were several standout aspects that made it enjoyable. There were a few minor issues that could be improved. It didn't significantly affect the experience. It is clear that effort was put into making this a worthwhile option.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Placement is average, faculty teaching is also average, infrastructure and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering (NBNSCOE) in Solapur, Maharashtra, has demonstrated commendable placement performance in recent years. Approximately 80-90% of students from various courses have secured placements, with the Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) department achieving nearly 100% placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, NBNSCOE strives to provide a supportive and enriching environment through its infrastructure and facilities, contributing positively to the academic and personal growth of its students. The infrastructure is good. The hostel is well-maintained, and the rooms are very clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is the most amazing college in Solapur. Really good infrastructure, faculties, etc. are there.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students are placed at Sinhgad College. INR 13.5 lacs is the highest package, and INR 4.5 lacs is a medium package. INR 1.5 lakh is the lowest package. Wipro, Infosys, Tata, Intel, etc. are the recruiting companies. 40% of students got internships at Jio companies. Overall it is the best.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best facilities and infrastructure are available at Sinhgad College in Solapur. At this college, wi-fi is available on all campuses. Reading halls and labs are very big, as are classrooms. The college library is available to students. In the library, various books are available for exam preparation. Hostel facilities are average. In the hostel mess, average-quality foods are available. Last month, sports and games were conducted at the college.

description: Sinhgad College Solapur cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Sinhgad College Solapur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Sinhgad College Solapur cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 258175 and 463516 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 258175, B.E. in Computer Science Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 223164.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 258175.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Sinhgad College Solapur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 53.61 and 79.89, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 79.89. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 53.61, Electrical became the lea

Sinhgad College Solapur MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 79.89. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 81.4 in the General category under the HS quota.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the most competitive specialisation was M.E. in Structural Engineering, with the cutoff being 9.29.

reviews.review_heading: It is the top college in Solapur in terms of fees, teaching, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college had the largest area among all engineering colleges in the district. It had labs for every subject. Every department had its building. Our college provided facilities like a canteen, a mess, a store, a hostel, an ATM, a parking facility, and large playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities like a bus facility, hostel facility, Wi-Fi, and a library. A reading room is provided, where students can study after college hours. During the university examinations, students can study at night in the reading room.

reviews.review_heading: In 2022, our college had excellent facilities and a high placement rate.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided good facilities. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. There were six to seven labs for practice. They had separate classes, but there were three classrooms in the first year. Hostels were one of the best parts of our college. We had a huge playground.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and high placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. A library is available 24/7. All books are available related to any department. The food quality in the canteen is very good, and also in the mess. Many games are played on campus. At the end of December and start of January, a sports week is held.

reviews.review_heading: Review of N. B. Navale Sinhgad College of Engineering, Solapur.
reviews.review_text: There are separate hostels for boys and girls. The anti-ragging mechanism is established. Round-the-clock security is available at all necessary places. Students are not allowed to be outside the hostel after 9.00 pm. Students are allowed to study in the library reading hall up to 11.00 pm. Students have easy access to stationery, laundry, and other basic shops available on the campus. Facilities like groceries, fruits, stationery, Xerox, fruit salad, milk, and all daily needs are available in s...

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in Solapur.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in our college, like Wi-Fi availability, classrooms, playgrounds, 2 libraries etc. The quality of hostel, mess and canteen is a bit good and satisfactory. There are four playgrounds in college. Sports competitions are arranged by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Adventure of Sinhagad, I had amazing experience
reviews.review_text: It is just amazing experience of my college life. I missed my friends they failed in 1st year 2nd year. In college campus there are individual building for individual branches of engineering like computer Science, electrical, mechanical etc. And every student can access free Wi-Fi internet of daily limit they give you an id and password to every student they use free internet. Bigger classroom almost 100 student can easily manage in every classroom. I miss my college after last semester however ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good along with its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. The campus is very big there are several buildings each allotted for different departments. Some of the areas are closed due to pandemics. The college is taking care of Covid-19 things strictly. They are checking temperature, providing masks to the students who do not have them, use sanitizer whenever and wherever required. The laboratories, reading rooms, and classrooms are big and comfortable. Everything is systematically organised in this college, st...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is located in a good place.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good hostels, labs, and workshops. The staff is good and supportive. Labs, reading rooms, and classrooms are big and comfortable. Everything is systematically organised. Loved the experience of being here.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.

reviews.review_text: This college is full of facilities and infrastructure. In every department, there are CCTV labs and also there is a central library occupied with many types of books. Each student has Wi-Fi and it's password. Hostel I would rate 5 stars. Hostel is the best. I would rate 5 stars to the quality of food. Central canteen is available. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty are good but low placement chances on campus.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and hostels have good infrastructure. In winter, there is a shortage of water in the hostel bathrooms. In summer, we have to go to an admin block for drinking water. It is about 500 meters from the boys' hostel. Wi-Fi does not work properly many times in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college environment is very good and pollution-free.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of labs and classrooms are very good and well-maintained. The college also provides the facility of a library in which all types of books are present. The college also provides a Wi-Fi facility. The college ground is very small and the mess food is also below average. And the college also provides a gym facility but the condition of the gym is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is located on hills side which is beautiful.
reviews.review_text: The facility was little bit good but infrastructure is best with Wi-Fi facility available throughout the campus and comfortable classroom and the best quality of labs. The quality of mess food is also good and hostels are very safe for students no ragging is there. And there are many games facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the environment of our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a proper Wi-Fi connection on campus. Sports events are organised regularly. It has a very wide field for students to play games. I recommend students to take admission to this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of THDC Institute of Hydropower Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well equipped with everything. Tables and chairs are in good condition. Every classroom has projectors for studying and displaying content. The library is good and contains a decent amount of books. The library has a good environment. There is a separate room for study purposes. Wi-Fi condition is not good. Hostels are decent. The electricity cutoff is very low. Water supply is also good. The food served in the mess is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good but apart of this, overall the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good and classrooms are maintained well. Each classroom has a smartboard. Well-furnished furniture is present. Sports and activities are conducted in the college. Students have to take the initiative themselves. One room is allowed for three students in the hostel. Wi-Fi facility is available but it does not work well. Mess food is overall good.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied due to faculty.
reviews.review_text: Since the strength of students is very low we have better facilities like a smart screen, chairs, and tables in the classrooms. Wi-Fi is also available for students. The gym is also available but accessories are less. Hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good for a government regulated institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay I think, while the hostel, experiences frequent water outages the living conditions according to me are fine, the classrooms and labs are also good, but not up to the level they should be and the computer labs are also not up to date with the programming languages that we have in our course.

reviews.review_heading: Not a good if you seriously want to learn something .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of this college are good. The library and classroom are in good condition. Labs are functional and equipment are in good condition. Wi-Fi facility is also available although it's daily limit is only 1 GB but speed is good. Hostel rooms are spacious and are in good condition. The view from the boys hostel is phenomenal. There are few games available in the hostel like volleyball and cricket but the condition of the playground is bad. So overall infrastructure of ...

reviews.review_heading: The environment around the campus is awesome.
reviews.review_text: This college is best in infrastructure. It builds its buildings with a high standard of architecture. Labs and classrooms are very clean and well structured. The hostel infrastructure is good, but the quality of food served is a little low. It may be due to lots of students being available. Overall, it is good in hospitality.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best government college in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: There are two boys hostels and a girls' hostel inside the college campus. Hostels are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and ethernet connection, and there is a common room and a mess in each hostel. The Wi-Fi speed is around 100-150 MBPS, and students can get their identity to log in. There is a limit for 1st, 2nd and 3rd-year students, but it is unlimited for 4th-year seniors. There are around 20-24 rooms on each floor, and the buildings are 2 floored. The boy's hostel is for 1st and 4th-year students, ...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is located in the hills.
reviews.review_text: Top-class facilities are available in our college. You can get free Wi-Fi service all the time. The library has all the books, and you can issue them within 10 hours and 6 days a week. The quality of food in the mess is average and not that good. For sports, cricket is available.

college_info.intro: Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology popular programmes are BTech and MCA. BTech is offered in various specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence (AI), Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. BTech students are placed in top companies at top positions. The students go through training to face campus interviews. There are trainings arranged in Aptitude tests and group Discussions, and students are prepared for Technical and HR interviews. Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology aims to provide a learning ambiance to students to generate innovative and problem-solving skills with professionalism. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fees:

Organized & proactive placement process

Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for offline learning, students can choose from various streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG stage, course available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is an exciting array of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MCA. Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology fee structure ranges between INR 80,000 to 2,60,000.

individual_reviews.title: There is very good infrastructure at our college.

content.Placements: There are 60% of students who are placed from our college. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the minimum package is 5 LPA. Almost all the students got an internship from our college, and there is an internal internship programme too in our college. The roles which are offered are development-related.
content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities in the college, such as computer labs with the internet. Proper sitting classes are also held at their perfect time, and all the syllabus is completed on time. The hostel facilities are too good, and the canteen size is big and has so much space.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A college with good infrastructure but placements are not good.

content.Placements: I'm pursuing a bachelor's degree in the artificial intelligence branch. This batch was started in 2021 and I will pass out this course in 2025. Unfortunately, the course failed to meet my expectations in multiple aspects. The placement scenario is far from ideal. I'm in my 7th semester, and not even a single student in our branch is placed. Not only in the AI branch, CS branch students are also not placed in any company. While the college advertises big names, most of them are local startups. Internships are a similar story. The software developer intern is the most offered role for our college students.

paragraphs: Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology admission is open for the academic year 2025-26. The college offers one UG and two PG courses, such as BTech, MTech and MCA. Admission to all the courses offered atSri Balaji College of Engineering and Technologyis merit-based. Further, colleges may accept entrance exams for specific courses. Candidates can apply for admission to their desired course online by visiting the college's official website. Check out the table below for admission highlights of the Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology:

Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology admission to all the courses is merit-based. Admission is ongoing on the official website of the college. The college offers courses including BTech, BTech Lateral, and MTech at UG and PG levels respectively. Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology admission process includes various steps starting with filling out the application form, fulfilling the course-wise eligibility criteria and paying the fee for final seat confirmation. The college offers merit-based admission to all the courses. Want to know complete details about theSri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology admission process 2025,go through the following section.
Step 1: Application Process

Candidates looking for admission to various courses at Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology are required to fill out the application form online by visiting the official website of the college.
Step 2: Selection Round

To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria, the candidates must have passed Class 12 for admission to UG and a graduation degree for admission to PG courses. The college offers direct admission based on their merits.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
After filling out the eligibility criteria and selection round. The candidates must paySri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology feewithin the given deadline to grab the final seat.

However, to be eligible for admission candidates must have a Class 10 and Class 12 scorecard from a recognised board for UG courses and pass graduation degre for admission to PG courses.

faqs.question: Can I apply for admission to Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology eligibility criteria specifies the minimum qualification and aggregate required to apply for a programme. Candidates can apply for UG courses with their Class 12 score with 45% aggregate (40% belongs to reserved category) in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as compulsory subjects from a recognised board.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology offers merit-based admission. The candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to get admission. The eligibility criteria for all the UG courses is pass Class 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggregate (40% belongs to reserved category) in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as compulsory subjects from a recognised board and for admission to UG degree candidates are required to pass a raduation Degree in a relevant field with 50% aggregate (45% belongs to reserved category) from a recognised university.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance for admission to Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Sri Balaji College of Engineering and Technology offers merit-based admission to all its courses. There isno entrance examneeded to get admission tothe college.  Further, colleges may accept entrance exams for specific courses. To get admission, candidates are required to apply on the official website of the college for admission form. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria i.e pass Class 12 for UG courses and pass graduation degree for PG courses. After the process is completed, the institute offers direct admission.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is overall good. There is a large building. It has lights, fans, and a ventilation system with a fire extinguisher and fire alarms. Air-conditioned computer labs are available. There is Wi-Fi, but it's only for faculty. Students are not allowed to use Wi-Fi. The library contains a large collection of books, but sometimes there is a shortage of seating arrangements in the library. As I'm a day scholar, I don't know much about hostel facilities but as my friends told me, the foo...

reviews.review_heading: College doesn't matter. Student skills matter. College is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. All sports facilities are available in this college and all types of labs are available, like in B.Tech CSE, OOPS lab, DSA labs, such types of labs are available in the college. Hostel food is very good compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering .

The mess is very good. The food at the hostel is awesome. There are three canteens, a sports ground, and medical facilities available at any time.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for taking admission at a reasonable fee structure.

reviews.review_heading: Sri Balaji college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities. The hostel has many rooms. Our college has a library. It has Wi-Fi. Our college has many labs like a chemistry lab, a physics lab, and an electrical lab. The quality of the food is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided all the necessary infrastructure and facilities. The campus was very big and Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms and labs were clean and hygienic. Transportation facility was provided to all the local students. Hostel facility was very good. Mess was hygienic and clean and served tasty food.  Practical labs like the machine lab, circuit lab, and power system lab were well-equipped and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The students can join this college if they want.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi data was limited speed, and the infrastructure was good. Hostal rooms were good and the mess food was average. The playground was good also had a gym multiple basketball courts, football, and cricket grounds. Students can play any outdoor game they want.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities and less experienced teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus is less with Wi-Fi and Jio Wi-Fi facility. There are two huge libraries. It has four buildings, and the building is always scheduled for online examination. Our college has three buildings for the hostel. One hostel building is available with a single room and attached bathrooms. The second hostel building has single rooms, but it does not have attached bathrooms. The third hostel building provides three sharing rooms for students. Our college has a huge cricket ground. There ...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty's, good infrastructure and facility in 2015.
reviews.review_text: In our college have Good and aesthetic infrastructure and good facilities are provided by the college campus as big library, class room, play ground, garden etc. In campus lift, also provided for students. Bus facilities also good and comfort seats provided. Sewage disposal plant and water harvesting system also in the campus to make them more unique to other and to study on them. High-speed Wi-Fi also available in campus area. Well conditions lab with air conditioning provided.

reviews.review_heading: No placements
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and all the instruments are available. Whole campus area is connected with HI-SPEED Jio Wi-Fi, the biggest library is of this college under RTU, Kotak. Sports and games events are organized. Sports grounds are good. Library is also accompanied with e-books.

reviews.review_heading: This college is average. The college infrastructure is not good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not good. They give a limited data of 250 MB per student per day. The classrooms are average. There are no smart classes. The library is also good for all departments. The canteen is not well. The games facilities are also good.

college_info.intro:
IIMT Studies Chandigarh offers courses such as the Pre-Graduate Program in Mechanical Engineering and Professional Graduate Program in Civil Engineering as its flagship programmes. The Institute offers admission to these courses on the basis of merit and previous qualification examination.
Apart from this, candidates must have a of work experience 2 years to be eligible to seek admission at IIMT Studies Chandigarh. The Institute offers these courses with a tuition fee ranging from INR 70.7K to INR 1.4 Lakh. For more details around IIMT Studies Chandigarh popular programmes, check out the table below:

placements.overview: IIMT Studies Chandigarh offers placement assistance by providing various opportunities to build a resume. Apart from that, the Institute offers workshops, activities, and various other industry-oriented events. Some of the top companies that visited the campus during the IIMT Studies Chandigarh placement drive are Amul, Reliance Industries Limited, STPL, and others.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IIMT Studies Chandigarh offers BTech, Diploma, PG Diploma, and other PG-level courses full-time, distance, and online. The Institute offers these courses for the duration of 14 months, Certificate courses for 6 months, Pre-Graduate courses for 20 months, Professional Graduate courses for 2 years, and PG courses for 1 year. Admission to these courses is permissible based on last qualification examination scores and 2 years of work experience. For more details on IIMT Studies Chandigarh courses, fees and eligibility, check out the table below:

admission_process.title: IIMT Studies Chandigarh Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIMT Studies Chandigarh admissionsare given to students on merit-basis. The institute shortlists various candidates for admission basis the merit in the last qualifying examination & the work experience. IIMT Studies Chandigarh gives distance & online programmes specifically to students with at least 2-years of of work experience. The institute offers eduqual accredited pre-graduate, professional graduate and PG diploma courses.

The institute offers admission to candidates based on their qualifying exam score and work experience. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for the preferred course. Below are IIMT Studies Chandigarh courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 10 along with 3 year diploma with 2 years of work experience
Class 12 along with 3 year graduation in any discipline with no experience required
Class 12 with 3 years of relevant work experience related to the stream of course
IIMT Studies Chandigarh admissionsare currently open. Candidates must first apply to be considered for admission in the institute. Below are the steps to get a seat in IIMT Chandigarh:

1:The mode of application is online. Aspirants have to fill out details such as name, email, phone number and work experience in the form. Candidates also may need to pay an application fee to register for the course.
2:The institute evaluates the application forms of the candidates for selection. Admission to IIMT Studies courses is based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam.
3:The institute informs the shortlisted candidates about their admission status. Once selected, aspirants need to pay theIIMT Studies Chandigarh feeto confirm their seat.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lokmanya Tilak Jankalyan Shikshan Sanstha's Priyadarshini College of Engineering offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Lokmanya Tilak Jankalyan Shikshan Sanstha's Priyadarshini College of Engineering offers M.E./M.Tech. The fees for Lokmanya Tilak Jankalyan Shikshan Sanstha's Priyadarshini College of Engineering courses range between INR 94,444 to 4,73,044.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Priyadarshini College of Engineering is a reputed college in Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: If you work hard on your studies and skills you can find good placement opportunities. The average package is about 2 to 3 LPA while the highest package is around 10 to 12 LPA. Most students secure internships. It is a good college in Nagpur that you can consider.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am not a hosteler so I don't know much about the hostel facilities but some of my friends tell me that the college hostel is not very good. They prefer other private hostels or rooms that are affordable and decent. The courses offered are good and the campus facilities including classrooms, are above average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College Tour to the PCE!

review_content.Placements: Hi, I am a third-year Mechanical Engineering student. My batch is the last university batch of the college; now our college is autonomous. The college is private and doesn’t have a high cutoff percentage, so anyone can easily take admission. The college has good placements, with students getting average packages of 6-7 LPA, and around 40-50 different companies came for recruitment. As a Mechanical Engineering student, I have a lot of opportunities in various fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has the biggest campus in the city, with separate buildings for each department. All laboratories have new equipment, and each department has its own library, along with a central library that is also available in college. There is 24 hours of free Wi-Fi and nicely organized classrooms with projectors. Hostels are also available from the college, with good accommodation facilities, and there are many PG rooms available in the college area.

overview_faqs.question: Is Priyadarshini College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Priyadarshini College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Priyadarshini College of Engineering has a rating of 3.9 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.12 on Campus Life, 3.32 on Placements, 3.97 on Faculty and 4.19 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Lokmanya Tilak Jankalyan Shikshan Sanstha's Priyadarshini College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is absolutely good because of the staff members and the campus beauty.

content.Placements: There are no huge placements from the college, but as of now, the college is autonomous, and it can be increased. The Electronic and Telecommunication department has the most placements from the college. The minimum salary package is 5 LPA, which we can easily get from the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good building and infrastructure. The college provides good grounds for playing and a sports department. Every department has its own seminar hall, a projector room where teachers are teaching on the projector for better understanding.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Detailed review of Priyadarshini College of Engineering, Hingna, Nagpur.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering from 2024 and currently in my first year. More than 50% of the students are placed in CSE. The average salary is 4 LPA, and the highest is 12 LPA. Many companies, like Infosys, etc., visit our campus. From the 3rd year, students start to get internships. You have to be in touch with the placement cell for that, this is what my senior said.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of PCE Nagpur is huge spread over 72 acres, but most of it is not developed, the maximum space it empty. College was established in 1992, so the infrastructure is old-fashioned. Classrooms are moderate. From 2nd year, every stream has a separate building. I live in Nagpur, and some of my friends say the hostel is average compared to the fees. In 2024, the fee was Rs. 65,000 per year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Priyadarshini College of Engineering is a reputed college in Nagpur.

content.Placements: If you work hard on your studies and skills you can find good placement opportunities. The average package is about 2 to 3 LPA while the highest package is around 10 to 12 LPA. Most students secure internships. It is a good college in Nagpur that you can consider.
content.Infrastructure: I am not a hosteler so I don't know much about the hostel facilities but some of my friends tell me that the college hostel is not very good. They prefer other private hostels or rooms that are affordable and decent. The courses offered are good and the campus facilities including classrooms, are above average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College Tour to the PCE!

content.Placements: Hi, I am a third-year Mechanical Engineering student. My batch is the last university batch of the college; now our college is autonomous. The college is private and doesn’t have a high cutoff percentage, so anyone can easily take admission. The college has good placements, with students getting average packages of 6-7 LPA, and around 40-50 different companies came for recruitment. As a Mechanical Engineering student, I have a lot of opportunities in various fields.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the biggest campus in the city, with separate buildings for each department. All laboratories have new equipment, and each department has its own library, along with a central library that is also available in college. There is 24 hours of free Wi-Fi and nicely organized classrooms with projectors. Hostels are also available from the college, with good accommodation facilities, and there are many PG rooms available in the college area.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Disclaimers before you take admission .

content.Placements: College placement is not too good due to high recession in IT sectors This college offers a 3–4 LPA average package per year. Top recruiting companies are like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, teach Mahindra, etc. Internship from college depend on student but college provide 15-day virtual and offline internship My course is a 4-year B.Teach in Artificial intelligence and data Science .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is lush green campus with street light, playground and parking facility We get here big central library, which provides all types of reference books for study. Classroom are decent not too high-class, and provide college. labs are also decent.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 121591 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 78945 in 2023 and 121121 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely good because of the staff members and the campus beauty.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good building and infrastructure. The college provides good grounds for playing and a sports department. Every department has its own seminar hall, a projector room where teachers are teaching on the projector for better understanding.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed review of Priyadarshini College of Engineering, Hingna, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of PCE Nagpur is huge spread over 72 acres, but most of it is not developed, the maximum space it empty. College was established in 1992, so the infrastructure is old-fashioned. Classrooms are moderate. From 2nd year, every stream has a separate building. I live in Nagpur, and some of my friends say the hostel is average compared to the fees. In 2024, the fee was Rs. 65,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Priyadarshini College of Engineering is a reputed college in Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: I am not a hosteler so I don't know much about the hostel facilities but some of my friends tell me that the college hostel is not very good. They prefer other private hostels or rooms that are affordable and decent. The courses offered are good and the campus facilities including classrooms, are above average.

reviews.review_heading: College Tour to the PCE!
reviews.review_text: Our college has the biggest campus in the city, with separate buildings for each department. All laboratories have new equipment, and each department has its own library, along with a central library that is also available in college. There is 24 hours of free Wi-Fi and nicely organized classrooms with projectors. Hostels are also available from the college, with good accommodation facilities, and there are many PG rooms available in the college area.

reviews.review_heading: Disclaimers before you take admission .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure of college is lush green campus with street light, playground and parking facility 
We get here big central library, which provides all types of reference books for study. Classroom are decent not too high-class, and provide college. labs are also decent.

reviews.review_heading: Aeronautical Engineering at PCE!
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are available in this college. Also, there is one building for every department. There are hostels for both boys and girls, but I chose a private hostel in the area. The quality of the food is okay, and the cost is 80,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with facilities provided by college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good, spread around 80 acres, and has every kind of amenity required for any good college. Hostel facilities are also too good, as per my knowledge. There we get a good amount of meals. Canteens are well maintained and good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus but dissatisfied with some faculty, placements aren't good .
reviews.review_text: I would say our college is best in terms of infrastructure, we have neatly cleaned classrooms, a big library where we can get any book we want as well as quiet sitting and reading space. Our college also provides the facility of free Wi-Fi that gives speed upto 100mbps. There are a total of 3 canteens in our college and the food served is quite decent. There are always events going on in our college that you can participate such as sports, sports, singing, dancing, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good events are organised by the college.
reviews.review_text: Quality of facilities in our hostel is good. As in morning we get healthy breakfast which is limited. Lunch and dinner are unlimited. Wi-Fi facility is provided by college in our hostel. Rooms are also acceptable which contains a bed and a study table. Medical facilities, guards are also present in our hostel. Sports facilities are limited.

reviews.review_heading: Big campus and lots of knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Different facilities are available like Wi-Fi, clean classrooms and library. Also, the college hostel is good. The college building is very clean. In library the computer are available to work and also the college provide the filter water to the students to drink. Hostel is good and average. The mess of hostel is good and average.

reviews.review_heading: Top notch education and innovation.
reviews.review_text:
Our college facilities and infrastructure are good, having 70 acres of campus, providing free Wi-Fi, good classes, well-equipped labs, big grounds, etc.
The hostel of our college is very nice; the food quality is also good and proper sanitation is done in the college. Rooms in the hostel are of good quality and have a good price.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Priyadarshini college of engineering, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: *The college campus is about 75 acres. *The college campus is full of Wi-Fi enabled, and the Rajiv Gandhi Complex of PCE has 250+ computers with Ethernet capability. *The hostel is not very good for students and the quality of food available is very poor. *The college has a gym, swimming pool, 3 canteen and 2 grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college in each facility.
reviews.review_text: Many Facilities are available in our college like Wi-Fi facility where Wi-Fi is present in each and every department of our college. Canteens are available with acceptable taste and quality of food. Hostels are provided outside the college. A ground is also provided for sports. Libraries are also available with well stocked books in it where we can issue with our id.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in every corner of our college, which we can access by using a given ID and password. Libraries are also available in every department with full-stock books in them. There are also three canteens available for students and staff at our college. Food is acceptable. Ground is also provided by the college without sports materials.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with its branches placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our the course is good with the best classrooms. The building of CSE is very beautiful. The Classrooms are clean enough. Libraries are provided for each department with well-stocked books in it and with a great study environment. Wi-Fi facility is also available in every department which we can access with the given username and a password.

college_info.college_name: College of Dairy Technology, Pusad: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around College of Dairy Technology, Pusad Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Dairy Technology, Pusad offers various programmes at UG level. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. The fees for College of Dairy Technology, Pusad courses is INR 1,10,000.

review_content.Placements: Students with 75% and above in 12th were placed. The highest salary offered is Rs.40000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs.15000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Haldiram, Amul, etc. About 100% of students got internships in companies like Lactalis India, Amul, Mother Dairy, Govardhan, etc. Top roles offered are technical officer, operator, food inspector, manager, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and a library are available in our college along with a gymkhana. A huge ground is also available where sports week is celebrated. Hostel is cooperative where students can eat food of their choice. Games are also available in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good, with good placement in 2022–23, a good environment, etc.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, there are a total of 32 students and till now, 60% of the students have been placed and more companies are still coming, like Haldiram and Amul, which are the mass recruiters. The highest package received by the student is INR 8 LPA, the lowest package is INR 2.5 LPA, and the average package is INR 4 LPA. In the final year, all students got internships, or 95% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi is available on campus, and in the library, there are about 40,000 books; there is also a study circle for students. Overall, the infrastructure structure is good. The hostel is good. There is wi-fi, hot water is available in the bathroom, mess food is also decent but not as good as home food, medical facilities are there, and an ambulance is there for any emergencies. Sports are also good; there is a volleyball court in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of ragging and campus life.

review_content.Placements: I have not found a good number of students to get placed after passing out from this college. Every student must pursue a PhD to get a good job unless they don't have a job or get a job with a salary of Rs. 10,000 per month. So, I would recommend you not to take admission in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very poor. The girl's hostel contains only 8 rooms, and if more students take admission, then they force 3-4 students to adjust in one room. Seniors rag juniors in the hostel, and even they tell to prepare food for them.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best choosing college ever.

content.Placements: I had the opportunity to experience the placement process at BMS College of Engineering, and there's my review based on my experience. The university has a dedicated placement cell that organizes placement drives every semester. The highest package offered is 30 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is located on campus, making it very convenient for attending classes. Rooms are share, and the space isn't huge. It is sufficient for the basic needs of students like a library, a playground, a seminar hall, classrooms, and a canteen. The food provided is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good college according to the fee charges and environment.

content.Placements: Placements at Adhitya College of Engineering are good. Many companies, like Google and other companies, provide placements. We have an internship program every week. Almost 85% of the students get placed here. The highest package was 25-30 LPA, and the lowest was 8.65 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good, and it has nice ventilation. The area around the college is surrounded by greenery, and the scenery is beautiful. classrooms are well-maintained and neat. Labs and library are great, and the nearby hostels are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the good and best college to choose.

content.Placements: The placements are yet to be known because it is newly opened, but the other branches of Aditya College have offered various placements with good packages around 25-30 Lacs per year. Various companies hire the students and the internship field is nice, good to go.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good, well-maintained, and clean. The surrounding areas are wonderful, full of greenery, and the best part is you will have a peaceful site with very good ventilation. According to me, it is good in the fresh greenery area.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computers Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great Support by the Faculty

content.Placements: Students are placed in the best of Indian and multinational corporate sectors, scripting their success stories. Scaling new heights in their careers, students are achieving success in companies like IBM, Oracle, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, HCL, HP, Tech Mahindra, HLL, Reliance, Johnson & Johnson, Tata Motors, Godrej, Nissan Motors, TCS, ICICI Bank, Citi Bank, HDFC, Future Group, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Separate hostels are available for boys and girls. Bus facilities are available and Wi-Fi is provided. Hostels are under CCTV surveillance, with sufficient space for students. Food is served on time and washing machines are available in the hostel. There are options for 2-sharing, 3-sharing and 4-sharing rooms in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good and absolutely nice.

content.Placements: 98% of students were placed. The highest package was 78 LPA, and the lowest was 3 LPA. Recruiting companies were Wipro, TCS, etc. It was a nice course. It was nice to have a seat in my college. We have great friends and family there, and recommend having you at this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our facilities were good. Hostel facilities were good but not well food provided to 75%. Food was good. There were opportunities for sports. Games were very highly played. It was a good college overall.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were very helpful. My teachers were very good. Teaching quality was good. Course curriculum made students ready for the industry, and it was good. reviews.review_text: This institute has a huge campus situated in a pollution-free environment. The infrastructure of the college is superb. The labs and classrooms are very comfortable. reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is excellent. There are various facilities available in our department. There are separate labs and workshops available. Hostel facility is also good with food, room, environment, and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for hard working students.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facility on the campus, but it is available for the students who stay in the hostel. The lab is well- developed, but some computers in the computer department are not in working condition. The library is great; you will get any book you want. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for hard working students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available in the college, but it is available in the hostel. Medical facilities are also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good and huge. Wi-Fi, computer laboratories, and mechanical laboratories are available. Medical facilities are also available. Sports grounds are available for matches like cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, attendance is not a big issue, but it depends solely on the principal and HODs.
reviews.review_text: The campus and infrastructure are excellent and the best in Thane district. Engineering courses offered here are civil engineering, mechanical engineering, computer engineering and EXTC engineering. The diploma course is offered in mechanical engineering and civil engineering. The fee structure is quite less than other colleges in Thane district. fees_and_eligibility.overview: University College of Engineering, Vizianagaram, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 54,000 to 1,80,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College surroundings are peaceful and the environment is super cool in winter.

review_content.Placements: In our Information Technology batch 85 percent of students are placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA the lowest package offered is 3.5 LPA and the average package offered is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS Infosys Wipro Accenture and Cognizant. 70 percent got internships in similar firms for developer and analyst roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Information Technology department at JNTU Vizianagaram has well equipped computer labs with high speed Wi-Fi smart classrooms and a digital library. The hostel provides good facilities clean rooms and 24/7 water and power. The mess offers hygienic and tasty food and the canteen serves a variety of snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus with a health center and students actively participate in sports and games with well maintained grounds and indoor facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of University College of Engineering, Vizianagaram.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70 percent of students from our batch got placed. The highest package offered is around 8 LPA, the lowest is around 2.5 LPA, and the average package stood at 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Capgemini. Many students also received internship opportunities from reputed firms like Cognizant and Tech Mahindra. The roles offered are in software development, testing, and data analysis. The placements are decent. More core companies could be added for better opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with spacious classrooms, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and well-equipped computer and electronics labs. The library has a good collection of academic and reference books though seating space can be limited during exams. Hostel facilities are satisfactory. Rooms are clean and maintained regularly. The mess food is average but hygienic. There are basic medical facilities and a small sports area for recreation. The infrastructure is decent but could be improved in terms of hostel amenities and lab equipment upgrades.

review_summary.college_name: University College of Engineering JNTU Kakinada Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is good for students who really want to study.

content.Placements: More than 70 percent of students get placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the average package is 4 LPA, and the highest package is 10 LPA. Companies like Pennant, Infosys, Miracle, and Drishya recruit students. Around 70 percent of students are placed in Pennant, Miracle, and Drishya. The roles offered include data analyst, software engineer, system engineer, programmer, and many other roles in the software sector.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi in labs, the library, and across the campus. We have good facilities in the mess and canteen. There is a sports zone and games facilities. Medical facilities are also available, including a nurse and ambulance service. We have a dispensary for medicines and health checkups, and doctors are also available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My Experience as an EEE Student at JNTU.

content.Placements: I have completed my B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from JNTU - Gurajada Vizianagaram. Around 80% of my classmates get placed in campus drives. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The average package lies around 3.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, and L&T visit our college. The roles they offer are Electrical Engineer, Energy Analyst, and Maintenance Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has well-equipped Electrical, Machines, Power, and Electronics labs. We have a vast library. The hostel has clean rooms. The food is great as it is a student-managed hostel where they cook whatever we want. We have medical support available in our college. We have good sports facilities with courts and a gym.

individual_reviews.title: College surroundings are peaceful and the environment is super cool in winter.

The roles offered are in software development, testing, and data analysis. The placements are decent. More core companies could be added for better opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you want leisure time to pursue your own ambitions without being academically stressed.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are something you should worry about the most. It is a government college, so it doesn’t have a dedicated placement team that approaches companies and trains its students effectively. Students have to work hard on their own to get jobs. Don’t expect anything.

hostel.description: Hostels are provided facilities like Dining room, WI-FI connectivity, Reading Room with television, Indoor Sports facilities like Caroms and Chess, Outdoor sports facilities like Shuttle badminton, Throw ball courts Indoor Gymnasium, Common Yoga center, Dormitory.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Kabaddi Court, Kho-Kho Court, Hand Ball Court, Hockey Field, TenniCoit Court, Throw ball Court, Volley Ball Court, 200 Meters Athletics Track, Chess Boards, Caroms Boards

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

other_facilities: State bank of Hyderabad extension counter

reviews.review_heading: It is good for students who really want to study.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi in labs, the library, and across the campus. We have good facilities in the mess and canteen. There is a sports zone and games facilities. Medical facilities are also available, including a nurse and ambulance service. We have a dispensary for medicines and health checkups, and doctors are also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: My Experience as an EEE Student at JNTU.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped Electrical, Machines, Power, and Electronics labs. We have a vast library. The hostel has clean rooms. The food is great as it is a student-managed hostel where they cook whatever we want. We have medical support available in our college. We have good sports facilities with courts and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: College surroundings are peaceful and the environment is super cool in winter.
reviews.review_text: The Information Technology department at JNTU Vizianagaram has well equipped computer labs with high speed Wi-Fi smart classrooms and a digital library. The hostel provides good facilities clean rooms and 24/7 water and power. The mess offers hygienic and tasty food and the canteen serves a variety of snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus with a health center and students actively participate in sports and games with well maintained grounds and indoor facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University College of Engineering, Vizianagaram.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with spacious classrooms, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and well-equipped computer and electronics labs. The library has a good collection of academic and reference books though seating space can be limited during exams. Hostel facilities are satisfactory. Rooms are clean and maintained regularly. The mess food is average but hygienic. There are basic medical facilities and a small sports area for recreation. The infrastructure is decent but could be improved in ter...

reviews.review_heading: If you want leisure time to pursue your own ambitions without being academically stressed.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is below average, but the mess food is much better and bearable. The overall infrastructure is rigid and can be complicated if one doesn't adapt to it. Classrooms are spacious, but the labs are not equipped with adequate equipment. This is my experience.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members, better placements in 2023, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with projectors (hi-tech classes). Infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available. Hostel is very good when compared to other hostels. The students run mess in hostel so hostel is good. College is equipped with a dispensary. Sports and games are allowed like conducting sports days.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good and its raw.
reviews.review_text: The hostel bathrooms are worse than you think, it is terrible. The environment looks like you are surrounded by mountains and rocks. Mostly buses have better chance to take look on snakes and even more times on scorpions and mostly centipedes man.

reviews.review_heading: JNTU College is better for people with financial issues. Not many placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the labs, classroom, and library is average. Infrastructure is not that much advanced technology, but somewhat better. Poor quality in hostel infrastructure & facilities. Mess food is somewhat better because of student organisation. Mess, sports, and medical have good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: If students have money then they can go to a good private college and if not then it is a fine place
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Even though there is room for development, our university has never made any step towards progress. Hostel rooms are fine. Food is also fine. I have not found a single insect in the food yet. There is a dispensary but only for medicine. There is a sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best for every student.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the point college, course, and classrooms are very neat and a good atmosphere gives the university a feel. The most important thing in college is food and hostel. Coming to the hostel and food, my college hostel food is very good. But hostel has some modifications.

reviews.review_heading: This college consists of good infrastructure, placements, academics, a hostel and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Hostels provide accommodation for students, faculty, and staff, often within a campus setting. They typically include residential blocks, recreational areas and sports facilities. According to some sources, hostels contribute to overall student experiences, which is good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college are good. The infrastructure of the college is also good. Wi-Fi is available, with high-speed connection, but we should pay the money for it. The labs available in our college are good, students can feel good, and can learn.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best platform for the engineering students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college are Wi-fi, programming labs, classrooms with projectors, and library. The hostel facilities are rooms with nice ventilation and food quantity as much as you want. Canteen is available. Sports ground also there and medical facilities also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of seniors. It has good faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In my college, all departments have good infrastructure. We have a central library with free access to Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, a good hostel, and a mess. The quality of food is very hygienic. We have 2 canteens in college with all available stationary and snacks at reasonable prices. We have one ambulance in emergency and medical staff members. We have all types of games and sports in my college.

reviews.review_heading: JNTUGV - Royal civil engineering.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is good and also provides good meals. College infrastructure is also excellent in hostels. Every branch has different rooms and two blocks are available at this college for boys. Classrooms infrastructure is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good college with good facilities.

review_content.Placements: 1-2 companies visit the college. The highest package (4-5 LPA) and the lowest (2 LPA) in private companies, but more college students are placed in the government sector than in private. Pie Infotech (government sector): NTPC, NHPC, NHAI, NPCC. I don't know about the correct percentage. Junior engineering, assistant engineering, site engineering, project engineering, SDO, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Smart classes with projectors, good faculty, Wi-Fi availability, a good lab setup, a library, and the college is also going to start an e-library soon. Hostels are also good. Wi-Fi availability in the hostels. Water coolers for hot, cold, and normal drinking water, mess available, mess food is good, medical facilities aren't available (but in case anyone gets sick, staff take them to the hospital). Common room in the hostel for playing, dancing, chilling, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities but poor connectivity. Not much sports facilities.

review_content.Placements: Government Hydro Engineering college is new college. Companies have started coming only some time back. Some students get placed from here and some Students clear the GATE exam and pursue higher studies. This is new college so companies may don't know about it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice. There is full facility of wifi throughout the campus as well as in the hostels. There is one library which have good facility of wifi and AC. The classrooms are also very nice. Hostels are very nice. The mess food is average and the canteen facility is also good.

reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure, a new campus, and a new beginning.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of students got placed in the company. Most of the startup companies also visit our college like our alumni startup companies and provide internships. The top recruiting company is TCS. The highest package is around 15 LPA as seen by me. The average is around 3.5-5 LPA. The lowest is 2.8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a very new campus. It is very clean and fully equipped with the infrastructure. The library is well-maintained and clean. The canteen is also quite decent. Sports are not so supportive. There is Wi-Fi provided inside the labs for computer operation. There is a college hostel but is given for mainly girls. It is also very near to the college.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Krishna Institute of Technology.

Applied Materials, TCS, etc., will be coming for recruitment. No internships were offered here. Junior developer role will be provided.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure here were moderate as compared to other colleges. Quality of hostel food was good. Sports activities and sports equipment provided were very poor in this college. Medical facilities were good and first aid treatment was good.
