overview_faqs.question: Is Sri Krishna Institute of Technology worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Sri Krishna Institute of Technology are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Sri Krishna Institute of Technology has a rating of 3 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 2.8, 2.6, 3.4 and 3.1 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Krishna Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has knowledgeable teachers and good facilities.

content.Placements: I think many students got placed, i.e., 40% of students got placed as an employee. 20% of students got internships. 20% of students got free training for institutions. I think rather than that 20% of students did not get a job or internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is as good as other colleges. Facilities are also good as per the student's needs. The library is the best thing to get knowledge and we get many books from there. Daily newspapers and magazines are the best. In labs, there are good computers and updated versions of software will be available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I would ask you not to join Shri Krishna Institute of Technology near Hesaraghatta.

content.Placements: The students are placed in my college for different roles in many companies. But the placement percentage is very low at Sri Krishna Institute of Technology. The average salary that is offered by the companies is 5 LPA. This year the highest package is 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very bad at this college. Students are not allowed to use their phones. The college won't provide Wi-Fi facilities to the students. There are no hostel facilities provided by the college. The canteen food is really the worst but the cost is really high for that tasteless food. We do have a library on the third floor of the college but none of the students visit it. Sports and games are not supported by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, a new campus, and a new beginning.

content.Placements: About 75% of students got placed in the company. Most of the startup companies also visit our college like our alumni startup companies and provide internships. The top recruiting company is TCS. The highest package is around 15 LPA as seen by me. The average is around 3.5-5 LPA. The lowest is 2.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very new campus. It is very clean and fully equipped with the infrastructure. The library is well-maintained and clean. The canteen is also quite decent. Sports are not so supportive. There is Wi-Fi provided inside the labs for computer operation. There is a college hostel but is given for mainly girls. It is also very near to the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Krishna Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Compared to other colleges placements were very poor. Only in the CS branch students were placed. The highest package was around 6 LPA, and the lowest was 2.5 LPA. Applied Materials, TCS, etc., will be coming for recruitment. No internships were offered here. Junior developer role will be provided.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure here were moderate as compared to other colleges. Quality of hostel food was good. Sports activities and sports equipment provided were very poor in this college. Medical facilities were good and first aid treatment was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: While the faculty members are excellent, placement rates have not met expectations.

content.Placements: In 2024, the market was down, but I think for the 2025 batch, it will work fine. Currently, 50% of students got internships in companies, and the college is trying to provide internships for the remaining students. They are trying to get internships in some companies because nowadays, those who do internships in companies have a higher chance of being placed in the same company.
content.Infrastructure: Classes are well-equipped with projectors, and labs function perfectly. The Wi-Fi speed meets expectations, ensuring smooth internet access for students. The college campus features a canteen that provides a variety of food options. Additionally, there's a parking facility for vehicles, making it convenient for those who commute. Overall, the campus environment is supportive and well-rounded, catering to the needs of students and staff alike.

The cutoff was published for reserved and unreserved category students belonging to AI and HS quotas. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the last round closing ranks were between 89191 and 243157 in the General category for the AI quota. Considering the ranks, the most challenging specialisation for admission was B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence Engineering with the lowest cutoff rank

In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 79081, in the General All India quota.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Krishna Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure here were moderate as compared to other colleges. Quality of hostel food was good. Sports activities and sports equipment provided were very poor in this college. Medical facilities were good and first aid treatment was good.

reviews.review_heading: True facts about my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are above average; labs for all subjects are given where each student gets a chance to explore. I don't know about the hostel, as I am a day scholar, but as per the hostelers, it has good facilities and food with the best quality.

reviews.review_heading: Sri Krishna Institute of Technology offers quality education in engineering and technology fields.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities. A lift is available. Wi-Fi is available. The food is nice. Recently, they have started NCC training. They are good at supporting sports; they support both girls and boys. The canteen is also good; the food is very tasty. Overall, the college is good. Almost every facility is available. Everything is good about the college now. Our new campus is so good.

reviews.review_heading: Choose Sri Krishna Institute of Technology wisely.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is located on the top of a hill, which makes it difficult for us to climb it every day to attend the classes. Wi-fi is provided by the college, which is a good thing. The boys hostel is not facilitated but the facilities for the girls' hostel are present.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good and well maintained college with good faculty .
reviews.review_text: It's a newly constructed buildings good infrastructure and well-maintained campus. As I mentioned, it's a newly constructed building that needs some more time to be fully developed like cafés, parking lots, gyms, etc. They provide vans for transportation from the bus stop.

reviews.review_heading: Choose Sri Krishna Institute of Technology wisely.
reviews.review_text: Our batch starts with the 2022 batch. Hostels are also available in our college; both girls hostel facilities and boys hostel facilities are available in our college. Sri Krishna Institute of Technology is present in Chikkabanavara, Bengaluru. Hostelers can go out when needed, too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Krishna Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were good. Laboratory was excellent in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and all facilities are available except the canteen.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. Our lab sessions were conducted twice every week. We had classrooms with smart boards. A library was also available. The hostel fee was Rs. 65,00 per year. The hostel food was not good. There were no canteen facilities which was the main dissappointment.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is good with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. Our labs, classrooms, and library are average. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. The hostel is average and the canteen is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good food faculty members and management.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities are good. Our library is small compared to other colleges. The infrastructure of our classrooms is average. Smart classes are available in our college. Our college has a small playground. They do not give much importance to sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Our college provides many facilities like a library, a common room for girls, transport facilities, etc. Our college does not provide a canteen. The hostel is good. The food served in the hostel is not good. In the ECE department, labs are good. The EEE department labs are closed due to fewer students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: A good college for those who want to continue their studies further.

review_content.Placements: Companies like Mahindra, Tata visited this year. But campus placement is very poor in M. P. Polytechnic. Companies came but recruit only some of the students approximately 5-10 students in a class of 60 students. And the maximum salary offered by these companies is 19-20k.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good as compared to other government college. Good hostel and mess facilities in this price range. Classes are in average condition as compared to other government Polytechnic colleges. There is a big playground in campus in which you can play whenever you want.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: There are 7 to 8 courses in this course. You will get placements if you are eligible. A few top recruiting companies are L&T, Tata, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are better. Workshops are conducted in this college. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. There is a decent library in this college. Hostel rooms are good. The food quality is average. Sports are also not good. Cold water is provided in the hostel.
review_content.Faculty: Few teachers are average in this college. Teachers are knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant, but it does not make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are good but the checking is not good. Teachers are not able to complete the courses as per schedule. They also conduct surprise tests. It is mandatory to maintain 60% attendance to attend the exams.

content.Placements: Approximately 25% of students get placed. The highest salary offered is Rs.25000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs.8000 per month. content.Infrastructure: Some facilities are available, but the equipment does not work. Wi-Fi is not available. Labs are in poor condition. The library has a limited number of books. Hostel rooms are fine. The food is horrible. Mess and canteen are fine.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A good college for those who want to continue their studies further.

content.Placements: Companies like Mahindra, Tata visited this year. But campus placement is very poor in M. P. Polytechnic. Companies came but recruit only some of the students approximately 5-10 students in a class of 60 students. And the maximum salary offered by these companies is 19-20k.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good as compared to other government college. Good hostel and mess facilities in this price range. Classes are in average condition as compared to other government Polytechnic colleges. There is a big playground in campus in which you can play whenever you want.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements.

content.Placements: There are 7 to 8 courses in this course. You will get placements if you are eligible. A few top recruiting companies are L&T, Tata, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are better. Workshops are conducted in this college. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. There is a decent library in this college. Hostel rooms are good. The food quality is average. Sports are also not good. Cold water is provided in the hostel.
content.Faculty: Few teachers are average in this college. Teachers are knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant, but it does not make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are good but the checking is not good. Teachers are not able to complete the courses as per schedule. They also conduct surprise tests. It is mandatory to maintain 60% attendance to attend the exams.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The top 30 merit students got good placements from our college. The highest salary package is 5 LPA and the lowest salary package is 2.5 LPA, offered by top companies like Mahindra, TCL, Wipro Infotech, and many more. The roles provided in our course are in the IT sector and the web developer sector.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the necessary facilities available, like Wi-Fi and labs. The infrastructure of our buildings is in very good condition. There is a big library where all types of books are available, where you find a peaceful environment and studying there gives you motivation from other students studying there. We have a canteen near the library that has food available.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The various departments that are available here are computer science, electrical, mechanical, architecture, civil, etc. The hostel fee is too low, but there are food charges, which are not high. The classrooms are spacious and good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharana Pratap Polytechnic College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The library facilities are good. CSE branch books are not available in the library, and only some books of the CSE branch are available. Classrooms are average, and Wi-Fi is available in the computer science lab. Hostel quality is very good. Medical facilities are not available. The mess is average. Sports and games are played by every student.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for diploma in electrical engineering in Gorakhpur.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available in this college like free Wi-Fi, labs in every department, and a huge library with many books. The infrastructure of this college is excellent with a beautiful campus, playground, a cafeteria, canteen, three computer labs, etc. There is a boys' hostel in this college in which 40 rooms are available. Three boys reside in a room. Mess facility is also available in this hostel. The quality of food served is average and only vegetarian food is served by the mess s...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college in Gorakhpur with good faculty, placements & infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This is a good opportunity to get a good job in the IT field through this engineering degree. The facilities and infrastructure of Maharana Pratap are amazing. For computer science and engineering, there are 3 computer labs with high internet speed. This college also provides the facility of a library in which many books are kept related to the trades and other branches. This college is not limited only to the library. It also provides a boys hostel, canteen, indoor and outdoor games. The medica...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is better than other colleges and is top in the list.
reviews.review_text: Courses offered in our college are mechanical engineering, electronics engineering, electrical engineering, civil engineering and computer science engineering. There are mechanical labs, a computer lab, machine labs and many more. In block-A, there are 30 classrooms. There is a new building with 15 rooms, and the old building has 35 rooms. Good quality of our college is a hostel, canteen, medical, sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is well developed with greenery and proper high-tech classrooms and labs.
reviews.review_text: The college has greenery, proper blocks and buildings for 1st, 2nd and 3rd year students with high tech labs and smart classrooms. The college has separate workshops for different works like electrical shop, welding shop, fitting shop, foundary shop, sheet metal shop, machine lab, carpentry shop etc.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for studies, skill improvement and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college has many branches like electrical engineering, civil engineering, mechanical engineering, plastic engineering and electronic engineering. Electronic engineering is the most preferred branch. Labs are very interesting. Many other facilities like games, library, lab, annual function, etc., are also available. The college also provides game like badminton, football, kabaddi, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for diploma in Uttar Pradesh .
reviews.review_text:
Acceptable food is at a good price, and nice rooms are there. There is a very strict hostel warden and the best part is that there is no ragging throughout the campus.
Three students are allowed in each room and they should not be of the same course or branch; all three should come from different streams. Electric gadgets are not allowed inside the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has average placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are good. Our college infrastructure and facilities are good. Sports facilities are good. Medical facilities are available. The canteen provides food.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not very good. I would not recommend this college to anyone.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but interiors are not that good. Labs are useful. Every tool is available in the workshop. Every student practiced in the workshop and learned many things. Hostel infrastructure is very bad and mess is thee worst.

review_content.Placements: I am a student from B.Tech mechanical department 2010-2014. It's tough to get placement in the mechanical department. Some of IT-related, and service-related company visit DEC for placement purpose. If you are in the IT department, it is easy to get placed. If you want placements in the mechanical department, then you have to do it on your own. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. I am placed in Japan MNC.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classroom and library are quite good, clean and air-conditioned. Classrooms are spacious, and an auditorium is well-maintained. The canteen is just ordinary, which serves normal diet food.

If you want placements in the mechanical department, then you have to do it on your own. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. I am placed in Japan MNC.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom and library are quite good, clean and air-conditioned. Classrooms are spacious, and an auditorium is well-maintained. The canteen is just ordinary, which serves normal diet food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Good at faculty at very bad at placement.

content.Placements: Not Good placement as per mentioned. It takes too much nonsense talks by the management. Not good for placement. No groups comes for the placement of the student's. They have to adjust their selves. The placement faculty is not concerned and they are not good at placing the students.
content.Infrastructure: They have good infrastructure having the good interior. Clasees are big and fully a. c. Wi-Fi is also in the range of the campus canteen us quite good but the atmosphere is the worst we can. Say their is no park at all no practical labs are there to perform the actions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Very bad college with all aspects like placement, faculty, etc.

content.Placements: I never suggest this college for any of my friends, that much cheating, college specially in placement. I never saw that much acting on campus interviews. Coordinator is not at all responsible for that position. Please don't spoil your career by choosing this college.
content.Infrastructure: This institute has all standard laboratories for the courses. The campus hostel provides an adequate atmosphere for students who have no other viable options in proximity. It has sports ground capable of holding various track and fields events. The institute has an excellent football team.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Guru Nanak Institute of Technology, Nagpur:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology, Nagpur is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech. The fee structure for the Guru Nanak Institute of Technology, Nagpur programmes is around INR 1,92,000 to 2,28,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good including faculty, placement, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good at this college. Wipro, TCS, and many more companies Every year, companies come, and many graduates from the college get placed. The average package is nearly INR 7 LPA; the highest you can get is INR 12 LPA; and the lowest is INR 2 LPA. Placement is good here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very well maintained. The campus is in a good environment. The classroom is also well furnished with facilities like Wi-Fi. The library is also good. You will find many books to read. Mess has good food taste. The college also has a large field for playing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Guru Nanak Institute of Technology, Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: Placements at our college were the best among all the private colleges in Nagpur. The major job roles offered were structural engineer, structural design engineer, construction manager, and safety officer in leading companies such as BHEL, BSNL, HPCL, ONGC, etc. The salary package offered was 7 LPA to 16 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was old and historic. Apart from that, it was the best college. The hostel and mess facilities were good. Medical support was available on campus. Sports were a major part of our course curriculum.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty and Placements.

content.Placements: Our Guru nanak College is well known for its placements. So, we have around 94% Students are Successfully placed in Top Construction companies such as RS, Casagrand, DsMAx, EY and more. The highest package offered is 18 LPA and the lowest offer is 8LPA. Around 26% are placed in Internship Training.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are much better comprises to other Departments, our civil department has large research papers in Library and Large no of Books, high Wi-Fi in Library and Labs. Material is provided for Construction. Classrooms are well equipped with projectors.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides on-campus placement for a good campus life.

content.Placements: Placement is not much more than nearly equal to the 30 percent most off-campus students try with off-campus mostly visit companies are Triveni Turbine, gdcl and much more companies and students doing an internship by themselves with the average package will be INR 3 lakh.
content.Infrastructure: On-average infrastructure will be provided by the college with great classrooms, libraries and labs for project and for the book bank, the libraries have been provided. The cantina, medical and sports facilities are provide and a hostel provides good food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good including faculty, placement, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements are good at this college. Wipro, TCS, and many more companies Every year, companies come, and many graduates from the college get placed. The average package is nearly INR 7 LPA; the highest you can get is INR 12 LPA; and the lowest is INR 2 LPA. Placement is good here.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very well maintained. The campus is in a good environment. The classroom is also well furnished with facilities like Wi-Fi. The library is also good. You will find many books to read. Mess has good food taste. The college also has a large field for playing.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Guru Nanak Institute of Technology, Nagpur.

content.Placements: Placements at our college were the best among all the private colleges in Nagpur. The major job roles offered were structural engineer, structural design engineer, construction manager, and safety officer in leading companies such as BHEL, BSNL, HPCL, ONGC, etc. The salary package offered was 7 LPA to 16 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was old and historic. Apart from that, it was the best college. The hostel and mess facilities were good. Medical support was available on campus. Sports were a major part of our course curriculum.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It provides good teachers and has a good environment with decent placements every year.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students were placed in various on-campus recruitment drives. As I belong to the civil branch, the top recruiters were ACC Cement, Lohia steel, etc. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA by ACC cement. The average salary package offered was 3.6 LPA. Internships we provided from 3rd year only in various good companies such as Ultra Tech, ACC Cement, etc. Roles such as contract manager, etc., were provided.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, various facilities were provided such as Wi-Fi, well-equipped laboratories, classrooms with good ventilation, a library consisting of over a thousand books from different authors on the course. The department was very well maintained in terms of hygiene. The hostels were also very well maintained in terms of hygiene, greenery, etc. Food was also very good when it comes to quality and taste, both in the hostel and canteen. The hostel has primary medical facilities available, also the hostel provides table tennis, basketball court, etc.

reviews.review_text: As our campus ia big enough we have many buildings and each building contains labs. There are many computer labs as well as labs for other branches too. Everything use to he up to date. Our each classroom consists of Windows. There is a very big ground where students can play cricket, football or any outdoor game of there choice. reviews.review_heading: Sandeep's Review on Guru nanak institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: I don't stay in hostel but the infrastructure is good. The only issue is food quality. Wi-Fi is available in the wgole campus. Classrooms are also quite good and clean. The library is good but the availability of books is a big issue. We have also medical facilities in emergency. There is two common rooms for girls and boys respectively. Carrom and table tennis board available there and there is a big ground for playing outdoor games like cricket, football, Volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: College where only donkeys are getting manufactured.
reviews.review_text: Only infrastructure is there not quality of education. There is stationary store in college campus but if you have soft copy in your pendrive then you have to go long miles outside college campus because there is no facility for taking print out. Small ground where you have to play both football and cricket. No pitch for cricket. Yes we have basketball court separate. The only things in college which I love the most are auditorium and Canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with excellent facilities and faculty.
reviews.review_text: As soon you enter in the campus you'll see Greenery every with pleasent infrastructure. Talking about facilities they have good clean canteen with average food in medium price. Hostel facilities are also good with good quality rooms with clean and heginic toilets. The security facilities are great there is servelence every were.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is actually friendly !
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are actually good ! Many labs are there in our college specially for our branch. And benifit in our college is this that one grand college campus contains two colleges I. e. GNIT & GNIET.2 canteens are there and it is superb you can have there anything of your choice. Price as well as the taste, both are excellent. Apart from this common room is there for the girls in each building if not well and needs to rest.

reviews.review_heading: GNITC is an excellent path to accomplish your goals and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Our college occupies more than 100 acre of land with gigantic buildings of separate department and our own IT park. College has a open sourced Wi-Fi, with advanced laboratories, peiceful library, fully equipped hostel for both girls and boys which comprises of around 1000+ students of all years, college also provide medical facility as our college provides pharmacutical studies.

A:    Rajgad Dnyanpeeth's Shri Chhatrapati Shivajiraje College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council.

reviews.review_heading: This college is totally good their facility is average but the classroom and college.
reviews.review_text: My Course is mechanical engineering in the B. Tech course, which is a total of 4 years in divided into 8 semesters. My Course is mechanical engineering in the B.Tech course, which is a total of 4 years divided by 8 semester I have 6 backlogs in year so you need to clear a backlog first sem for enter 2nd year.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful college, very good.
reviews.review_text: There are very neat and clean hostels. My course is also good, and teachers are also good. Classrooms are very good and neat and clean. College staff is very friendly and very good. I recommend this college to every student. This college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but the campus is not very large or satisfactory for the students. The facilities in the college are better. All the labs are in good condition. There are no network issues. Everything is good. The hostel of the college is very impressive because the structure of the hostel is very nice, and the hostel staff is very supportive.

reviews.review_heading: There are very low chances of getting placed. Please do not waste your important four years & money.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available, but they are dusty, and there are no important items like scales, pens, pencils, stools, or tables. Hostel food is unhygienic, and the hostel building is average. There is a water filter, but cleaning of the hostel rooms is not done regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It provides all facilities like digital classrooms, libraries, Wi-Fi-enabled computer labs, and canteen. The hostel facility is very good. The food served in the canteen is not that great. The hostel students may have some issues regarding food. There are no options for food as there are no good hotels nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Campus of the college is good .
reviews.review_text:
library and Wi-Fi functions are available in campus.
Library is good.
Campus of the college is fresh.
Classrooms of the college are fresh and there are facilities of lights. 
College have two canteens and quality of food in canteen is good and mess quality of food also average.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, but don't expect placement. The environment is best, but far from Pune city.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are below average, but the environment is good. The most beautiful month is February, because it's called the Days Festival for one week. There is a lot of excitement and enjoyment happening. Sports are also enjoyable and exciting, and they're very good.

reviews.review_heading: College is best but I think in some places it could be more better and improvement is needed.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the department is not so good it's below average. There is no Wi-Fi. Computers in labs are not working well. Classrooms and library are great as compared to labs. Hostel for girls is in Bhor and college is in Dhangwadi so distance is 20 KM. So, if you decide to stay in a hostel you have to travel for at least 2 hours daily. This is one of the drawbacks. Hostel is too old and they don't provide basic facilities like cupboard, enough switch, and washrooms are common on one floor.

faqs.answer: Suguna College Of Engineering offers Degree courses including 7 UG course. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. faqs.answer: Suguna College Of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering fee structure for all the courses is around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Chemical Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering.

reviews_list.review_title: Better faculty members support and more extracurricular activities could enrich students experience.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 30% of students who completed the course got successfully placed. The highest package offered in our course is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2.4 LPA. The average package stood around 4.2 LPA. Recruiting company is GlowLogics Pvt. Ltd. 10% of students got internships. Roles offered is hardware engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for our course are decent, offering essential amenities such as Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and access to a library. While the resources are sufficient for learning, some areas could be improved for a better experience. Overall, the department provides an average learning environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Improve placements are needed.

review_content.Placements: The percentage is less. The companies that are brought are almost production companies or BPOs. Otherwise, startups require a huge amount of work time with very less for freshers. Rarely we get core companies. The highest package is 6 LPA, to my knowledge, it is 8 LPA not in my department. The recruiting companies are mostly startups and production-based companies. They don't permit us to go to internships in the final year. I got an offer letter from a BPO.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food is good. Though only veg is allowed on the campus. There are 4 canteens and 1 mess in total on the campus. You would get snacks such as the basic items lays, kurkure, other things, soft drinks, and others are also available. Oil snacks such as samosa and puffs cake are also available.

review_summary.college_name: Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an engineering college in Hour, Tamil Nadu. It is under Anna University.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are quite good, and around 70 to 80 percent of students from my batch got placed. The average package is around 3 to 4 LPA while some students received higher offers depending on their skills. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys and HCL. Many students also received internship opportunities in reputed companies which helped them gain practical knowledge. Roles offered are mostly software development, network engineer and analyst. The placement cell is very supportive and trains students with mock interviews, aptitude tests and soft skill development sessions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college is better than other colleges.

content.Placements: Above 70% of students get placed in my college. The highest package offered in my college is 12 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Zuvi, Nvidia, and Infosys visit my college to hire students from our course. Students with a CGPA above 8.0 are selected by companies.
content.Infrastructure: My college faculty members are really amazing at teaching subjects. In labs, classrooms, and the library, students are not allowed without ID cards. Sports and games are really enjoyable, and many students participate in sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Better faculty members support and more extracurricular activities could enrich students experience.

content.Placements: Approximately 30% of students who completed the course got successfully placed. The highest package offered in our course is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2.4 LPA. The average package stood around 4.2 LPA. Recruiting company is GlowLogics Pvt. Ltd. 10% of students got internships. Roles offered is hardware engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for our course are decent, offering essential amenities such as Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and access to a library. While the resources are sufficient for learning, some areas could be improved for a better experience. Overall, the department provides an average learning environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Improve placements are needed.

content.Placements: The percentage is less. The companies that are brought are almost production companies or BPOs. Otherwise, startups require a huge amount of work time with very less for freshers. Rarely we get core companies. The highest package is 6 LPA, to my knowledge, it is 8 LPA not in my department. The recruiting companies are mostly startups and production-based companies. They don't permit us to go to internships in the final year. I got an offer letter from a BPO.
content.Infrastructure: The food is good. Though only veg is allowed on the campus. There are 4 canteens and 1 mess in total on the campus. You would get snacks such as the basic items lays, kurkure, other things, soft drinks, and others are also available. Oil snacks such as samosa and puffs cake are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is simply strict about rules.

content.Placements: Students will get placed with a percentage of 75% and above. The highest salary package offered is around 9 LPA-10 LPA, and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month - Rs. 30,000 per month, based on skills. Top roles include TL and project manager. Many companies, including local companies in Bangalore, require software knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: In hostel, there are facilities like Wi-Fi, study hall, indoor sports, gym, and a TV hall. There is a medical facility on campus, available only during college hours. Food is good enough. Rooms in the hostel are also shared with faculty members, like professors.

paragraphs: Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Er. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,00,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.

description: Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering TANCET cutoff 2025 is out for admission to the MCA course. The Round 1 cutoff for MCA admission is 1820 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 2087; whereas in 2023, the cutoff rank stood at 3008 for the General AI quota. Comparing the latest year's first-round cutoff with the past two years, a downward trend can be seen for MCA admission.

Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering MCA cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The cutoff was released across different categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the TANCET first-round cutoff Rank stood at 1820 for MCA admission.
To view the cutoff details for other categories and rounds, aspirants can use the provided filters:

Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering accepts the Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) ranks, followed by a counselling process for admitting students to the MBA course. Candidates interested in taking admission to this institute must refer to the table below to check out the TANCET 2025 important dates to be eligible for admission.

Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) is a state-level entrance test for MBA and MCA courses in the colleges of Tamil Nadu. Candidates with a valid TANCET Rank are only eligible to appear in the counselling process. From the table below, students can view or download the round- and year-wise TANCET cutoff lists for Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering.

Students can view the Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at Er. Perumal Manimekalai College of Engineering was B.Tech. in Information Technology, with a cutoff rank of 48299.

reviews.review_heading: It is an engineering college in Hour, Tamil Nadu. It is under Anna University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good with spacious classrooms, well equipped labs, a digital library and Wi-Fi facilities that support learning. The hostel provides clean rooms, 24/7 water and electricity and the mess food is hygienic with a decent variety. Medical facilities are available inside the campus, and there are good opportunities for sports and games. The canteen is neat and offers affordable food. Overall, the facilities are well maintained and create a comfortable environm...

reviews.review_heading: My college is better than other colleges.
reviews.review_text: My college faculty members are really amazing at teaching subjects. In labs, classrooms, and the library, students are not allowed without ID cards. Sports and games are really enjoyable, and many students participate in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Better faculty members support and more extracurricular activities could enrich students experience.

While the resources are sufficient for learning, some areas could be improved for a better experience. Overall, the department provides an average learning environment.

You would get snacks such as the basic items lays, kurkure, other things, soft drinks, and others are also available. Oil snacks such as samosa and puffs cake are also available.

reviews.review_text: In hostel, there are facilities like Wi-Fi, study hall, indoor sports, gym, and a TV hall. There is a medical facility on campus, available only during college hours. Food is good enough. Rooms in the hostel are also shared with faculty members, like professors.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text:
In my intermediate, I want to take admission to this college by seeing its infrastructure, but it goes beyond than that. Our college has good buildings and good facilities. There is a good playground. I am advising my juniors to take this college infrastructures as a minimum benchmark.
.

reviews.review_heading: The best engineering college around Hosur.
reviews.review_text:
Each course has a separate block of buildings, where the CSE department is in the main block and has a computer lab facility. Free Wi-Fi is available in the lab, library, etc.
The hostel is divided into two sections, boys and girls, with a minimum distance of 500 meters and full security. Both hostels have separate hygienic facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college to build your career.
reviews.review_text: Our college had dedicated labs and digital classrooms for virtual teaching and digital exposure. In our course, we did multiple projects for academic and science exposure. The hostel was well-equipped with good hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: Good and optimal with great infrastructures.
reviews.review_text: The college has everything needed to improve the overall knowledge of the students. No Wi-Fi as the campus follows strictly no-mobile policy for the betterment of the students. The plants and trees surrounding the campus provide gentle breeze and eases one's mind. The classroom can be said to have moderate level of infrastructure but it never stops the learning process. I'm unaware of the facilities provided in the hostel but to my timid knowledge the facilities seems to be adequate.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good infrastructure and good environment for students who studied here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better and the environment is very pleasant.

reviews.review_heading: The mess, hostels, canteens, campus, and classrooms are first-class at this college.
reviews.review_text: There are smart classes for innovative learning. There are modern tools in the lab for practical learning that are in good condition. We have an e-library along with an offline library. We get healthy and hygienic food in the mess. The hostel for boys is neat and tidy. There is a separate hostel for girls with security. Medical facilities are available daily within the settled timetable. Sports and games are only once a week.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, mess, hostels, canteens, campus, and classes are first class.
reviews.review_text: It provides healthy and hygienic food in a mess and a neat hostel for boys. review_content.Placements: 40 to 60 percent students get placed depending on the course and additional certifications or internships. The salary package varies, with a nominal starting average of 1.8 LPA to 4-4.5 LPA. Companies like Wipro, TATA, and other emerging IT companies visit our college. Internships are provided to almost every student, with over 90% of students participating in internships. Our college trains us for various roles in the industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is amazing, with all the necessary facilities like labs, a library, and classrooms etc. The hostel infrastructure is also good, but the food and strict rules and regulations can be a concern for some. individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the quality faculty, decent placements, and strong infrastructure for BBA.

content.Placements: Around 75% of students get placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, and Deloitte. Nearly 60% of students got internships in HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and startups. Roles offered are analyst, HR, and marketing executive.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-maintained with modern labs, a good library, and clean hostels. The hostel has 24x7 water, decent food in the mess, medical facilities, and sports areas for swimming, badminton, and volleyball.

admission_process.title: Alva’s College Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Currently, Alva's College admission is open. The college offers various courses such as BCA, BA, MCom, MSW, etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the degree courses, the college also offers certificate courses. The college is affiliated withMangalore University. Alva's College admissions are entirelymerit-basedfollowed bypersonal interview.The application process atAlva's Collegeis a mix of offline and online. Students need to collect the application form from the college campus. Read the following article to know more aboutAlva's College admission2026:

Alva's College admissions to UG & PG courses are based on merit. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for Alva's College course admission 2026:
To know more about UG and PG courses,make your course selection here.
Note: The Students who studied outside Karnataka should obtain an eligibility certificate from Mangalore University at the time of admission without which the candidate will not be admitted.
Students can check theAlva's College PG prospectus here
Alva's College admission process includes registration, a merit list andpersonal interviewfor admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in Alva's College:
STEP 1: Alva's College Pune Application Process 2026
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 150 to complete the application procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Alva's College Pune shortlists candidates based on merit list and personal interviews. The college will display a provisional merit list.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to payAlva's College feeat the admission receipt centre.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with a good placement, and beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is free Wi-Fi for college purposes only. There is a good library and classrooms, labs are also good. Hostel facility is also very good on campus. We get medicine, hospital, and canteen. Gym is also available in college. There is TV but promptly they use.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good. They are doing many programs regarding placements.
reviews.review_text:
For our course, we are having extra classes based on the course; there are libraries, which is helpful to our studies. 
Classrooms are neat and clean, and they are providing many certificate courses, which is helpful to our courses.
Hostel canteen and mess are good. 
I don't know about hostels because I am a local.

reviews.review_heading: Average college for M.Sc. in Mathematics course.
reviews.review_text: This college has a wonderful campus. Nearly everything a student may possibly need is available, including the library, gym, cafeteria, and stationery. This campus has a cafeteria and stationery stores at practically every corner. There are amenities like projectors, computer laboratories, and Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: My Amazing College Table story.
reviews.review_text: The campus of this college is amazing. There is almost everything that a student needs, such as stationery, cafeteria, gym, library, etc. There is a stationery shop at almost every corner of this college, along with the cafeteria. There are facilities such as Wi-Fi, computer labs, projectors, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, and campus. Everything is available and quality of education is good.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, and equipped classrooms. The library is comprehensive, and hostels are well-maintained with good food. Medical facilities are readily available, and sports amenities include fields, courts, and a gym with fitness programs.

reviews.review_heading: College for a better future.
reviews.review_text: In terms of offered facilities and infrastructure, our college was top class. The infrastructure of the college was well maintained. The college has provided Wi-Fi facilities to the students. The college management was supportive of the students. The college also provides hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely dissatisfied with management. They make promises that they can't keep.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not up to the mark, but it is fine. Labs don't have the latest version of PCs. The library has some rules, like schools. Classrooms are also not that good. The rules in the hostel are like the rules in a primary school. The mess food is not good, but they charge more money for food. They don't support sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: They provide best quality education. And best training and education for sports and arts students.
reviews.review_text: College provides good infrastructure for students, digital libraries, smart classroom, Labs etc. And also college provide hostel facility for both men and women. Canteen are really good, and hostels and mess provides a moderate experience. And they are really good in sports and arts, and they have sports quota for students and they give training and education for sports students completely free. And they are overall champions in sports and arts almost every year.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the hostel wardens as they are so rude to everyone.
reviews.review_text: We do not have Wi-Fi available on campus. Labs, classrooms, and washrooms are clean. The hostel is average, but the food is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides plenty of job opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college were good and the infrastructure available for our course was amazing. It had a wide lab with required computer systems. Classrooms were very spacious. Our college had an extensive library with a big collection. Hostel facilities were quite good.

reviews.review_heading: It's the worst college, don't come here.
reviews.review_text: Library is nice. You can eat at the Taj Hotel for less money instead pf food court. I believe the quality is very poor for the price we are paying. I can say that medical facilities are irresponsible. When a boy went to our college medical centre with a fractured leg, the person there put the plaster on the wrong leg.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerut admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerut offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech and B.Sc. (Post Basic). On the other hand, at the PG level, the IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerut offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerut courses range between INR 1,20,000 to 2,44,800.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college environment is excellent.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very good at our college. The highest package in our college is 40 lacs, and the lowest package is 4.5 lacs. 85 percent of students were placed in our college. 65 percent of students got internships at different companies. Nearly 50+ companies have arrived at our college. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, TCS, HCL and some others.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is excellent infrastructure in our college and there are very good facilities in our college. Facilities for our course are provided by college management. They provided good wi-fi connectivity for labs, a good library and good classrooms with good ventilation. It is a college hostel facility for the students.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.
faqs.question: Q: Why do nurses fail Nursing classes?

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: IIMT group of college review by Yash Pratap.

content.Placements: More than 80% of the students were placed. The highest package offered was Rs 15 Lacs per annum and the lowest package is Rs 4 Lacs per annum. 20 percent of students got internships in my course.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in my course for the students including, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The quality of food made in our college was very good medical facilities and sports as well as game is available in my college.
content.Faculty: The teachers in my college were very helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. All of them in my college have good teaching qualities. The course curriculum is relevant and helps the students. It is very difficult to score good makes in exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: They provide good placements; the teachers are very cooperative.

content.Placements: The top recruiting companies are Honeywell and Tata Motors. The highest salary is 8 lakhs per annum. The lowest salary is 2.5 lakhs per annum. The top roles are product manager and nuclear engineer. The 65% of students get placed every year in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Our college provides good equipment. All labs are well-arranged. Our classrooms have projectors. The WiFi is available for college faculty members. The library is good. The hotel facilities are good. There is a canteen where you can buy some snacks.

The highest package in our college is 40 lacs, and the lowest package is 4.5 lacs. 85 percent of students were placed in our college. 65 percent of students got internships at different companies. Nearly 50+ companies have arrived at our college. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, TCS, HCL and some others.
content.Infrastructure: There is excellent infrastructure in our college and there are very good facilities in our college. Facilities for our course are provided by college management. They provided good wi-fi connectivity for labs, a good library and good classrooms with good ventilation. It is a college hostel facility for the students.

individual_reviews.title: Review of IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerut.

content.Placements: Approximately 76% of students were placed in our course. content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is awesome. The benches are comfortable. The classrooms are very big, fans and lights are good. Wi-Fi connection is available. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really great faculty and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: For this mechanical branch, the placements are a little bit low when compared to other branches. Around 70% of students will be placed in every batch. The highest package is 60 lpa, the lowest package is 3 lpa, and the average package is 10 lpa. Top recruiting companies are L&T, Mahindra, Tata, and Ntpc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. Full, strict security is there and no one can move out of campus without permission. The student must carry the ID card. There is no time to play; we can play games after college hours. The quality of the hostel is good and the food is hygienic.

admission_process.title: IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerut Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerut admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerut considers scores in JEE Main, CUET-PG, and Entrance Exam for admission to specific courses.IIMT Group of Colleges, Meerutoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 2 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,80,000 - 2,44,800. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,20,000 - 1,33,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

They provided good wi-fi connectivity for labs, a good library and good classrooms with good ventilation. It is a college hostel facility for the students.

reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is awesome. The benches are comfortable. The classrooms are very big, fans and lights are good. Wi-Fi connection is available. The library is very big; many books are available. Labs are also good. The hostel facilities are good, the food is very tasty, and a canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Really great faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Full, strict security is there and no one can move out of campus without permission. The student must carry the ID card. There is no time to play; we can play games after college hours. The quality of the hostel is good and the food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The best college and value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good, and the facilities we have included free Wi-Fi, free drinking water, canteen facility, and a college ground. In our hostel, the taste of food was nice and decent, not too bad, and we have a mini-play area in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Vibrant look of IIMT as per Me.
reviews.review_text: The college hosts cultural and technical festivals every six months, offering a vibrant campus life. A well-equipped library caters to academic needs, and sports activities occur both on and off-campus. Student-run clubs, such as the science club and art club, contribute to a diverse and engaging campus experience. The hostel rooms, while neither exceptional nor subpar, provide adequate living space. Meal quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: Great exploration of IIMT Noida.
reviews.review_text: Campus life has its limitations. I did not attend any fests due to scheduling conflicts, and the availability of books in the library was commendable. However, there were strict penalties for late returns. The absence of sports and social groups was a notable drawback, imparting the overall experience. Additional, the placement scenario was subpar, with a lack of core companies in the placement drives. The colleges often brought in companies from different branches.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good in our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and facilities are better. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Computer laboratory is available. There is a decent library in this college. We also have a lecture hall. There is a research center in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Projectors and audio-visual equipment are available. Sports are conducted on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college makes your life more effective and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. Free Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. Laboratory is better. There is a decent library in this college. Hostel facilities are better. CCTV cameras are installed in the hostels. Warden is very good.

reviews.review_heading: IIMT Group of Colleges is the best in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good and infrastructure is also very good.  All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and a big library are available. Food in our mess is very tasty. All the students are very happy.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very attractive but the classrooms are like old government schools. Our college provides Wi-Fi facilities are provided in classrooms and hostels. Hostelers get 2GB data and non-hostelers get 1GB data per day.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: It provides a big cricket ground, computer laboratories, and other course laboratories also. The whole campus has Wi-Fi services provided by the same network companies. But the net is also limited and has its own Wi-Fi with some limits. The campus contains a hospital also. Every sort of game is provided in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college, with average faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Only CSE and ME are available these days in IIMT Group of Colleges, AKTU. The infrastructure is above average. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are above average. Hostel facilities are very good rather than the college. Wi-Fi is available 24x7, and Wi-Fi speed is also very good. Rooms are very good, and only 2 students are allowed in one room, and every room has a separate bathroom. The mess and canteen are good, and the food quality in the mess is very good. Medical facilities, sports and g...

reviews.review_heading: The college is overall good, package is also not bad and I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We have a swimming pool, a big cricket ground, computer labs and another course lab also. The whole campus has Wi-Fi service provided by Janet and jioprivate net also IIMT has their Wi-Fi with some limits. The campus contains a hospital also. Regarding sports, every sort of game is present.
